title: ania elmeri
intro: Ania elmeri, also known as Indian snakeroot, is a plant species native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ania elmeri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ania elmeri is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of tinctures or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
